# thoth_governance_day7_report (Data Source)

Reads the governance day-7 report payload for the tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `days` (Number) Optional report window in days.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Day-7 report payload as JSON.
